hero.title: Quick Start Guide
hero.description: Create your first phonographic carousel in 5 minutes. Follow each step below to go from photos to a polished, ready-to-post carousel with style templates, audio, and creator provenance.
steps.0.title: Upload
steps.0.subtitle: Add your photos
steps.0.description: Drag and drop 1 to 10 photos into the upload area. KodaPost accepts JPEG, PNG, WebP, and HEIC files. Photos appear as thumbnails that you can reorder by dragging.
steps.1.title: Craft
steps.1.subtitle: Set the mood
steps.1.description: Choose a style template to set fonts, colors, and overlays in one click. Then describe your carousel theme, pick a camera emulation filter, and add vibe keywords that shape the tone of generated text. Koda uses these inputs to write slide overlays and a caption.
steps.2.title: Design
steps.2.subtitle: Style every slide
steps.2.description: Edit text overlays directly on the slide preview. Change fonts, adjust text position, pick colors, and fine-tune each slide individually. Navigate between slides using the thumbnail strip.
steps.3.title: Review
steps.3.subtitle: Preview the final result
steps.3.description: See all your slides in a carousel grid. Switch between platform tabs (Instagram, TikTok, LinkedIn, X/Twitter, YouTube, YouTube Shorts, Reddit) to preview format differences. Optionally add an audio track by recording a voiceover, uploading your own file, or browsing the built-in music library.
steps.4.title: Publish
steps.4.subtitle: Share with the world
steps.4.description: Select connected platforms and hit Post Now, or export a ZIP for manual posting. Toggle Creator Provenance to cryptographically sign your work with Ed25519 and embed tamper-proof authorship metadata. You can also add a brand watermark to protect your content across platforms.
mockup.upload.dropZone: Drag and drop your photos here
mockup.upload.fileHint: JPEG, PNG, WebP, HEIC up to 10 MB each
mockup.upload.callout1: Drag photos into the drop zone, or click to browse files.
mockup.upload.callout2: Thumbnails appear in a grid. Drag to reorder them.
mockup.upload.callout3: File types are validated automatically. HEIC files convert to JPEG.
mockup.craft.callout1: Pick a style template to set fonts, colors, and overlays in one click.
mockup.craft.callout2: Choose a camera filter to set the visual mood for all slides.
mockup.craft.callout3: Add vibe tags to shape the tone of generated text and captions.
mockup.design.callout1: Edit text overlays directly on the slide preview.
mockup.design.callout2: Use the font, position, and color controls to style each slide.
mockup.design.callout3: Click slide thumbnails to navigate between slides.
mockup.review.callout1: Switch platform tabs to preview format differences.
mockup.review.callout2: The carousel grid shows all your slides at a glance.
mockup.review.callout3: Add an optional audio track for video-format exports.
mockup.publish.callout1: Check the platforms you want to publish to.
mockup.publish.callout2: Toggle Creator Provenance to embed authorship metadata and an optional watermark.
mockup.publish.callout3: Use Export to download a ZIP for manual posting instead.
